items.answer_explanation: Retreating the king to g3 is the safest and most prudent move in this position. While moving the king to h3 or h4 exposes it to potential attacks by the black king or pawn, moving to g3 allows the white king to maintain control over the center and prepare for a possible pawn advance (e.g., Pf5-f4). This move also maintains the balance on the kingside, keeping the black pawn on b4 under control.
